hero.name: Yuvaraj Dhammure
hero.title: Software Engineer
hero.description: 2.7 years of building and crafting high-performance frontend solutions. Specializing in scalable React ecosystems and obsessed with pixel-perfect UI/UX.

about.summary: Frontend Developer with a proven track record of improving application performance by 30% through optimized code and advanced state management. Expert in the MERN stack, converting complex business requirements into responsive, mobile-first user interfaces.

highlights: Led frontend for Translation and Billing portals for 500+ daily users.
Improved data loading time by 25% using optimized RESTful API requests.
Ensured 99.9% data accuracy through real-time synchronization with Axios.
Increased mobile engagement by 40% by modernizing legacy UIs into responsive SPAs.
Reduced crash rates by 15% by configuring complex state with Redux Toolkit.
Cut future development effort by 10 hrs/week through component modularization.

projects.title: Localization Management System
projects.description: A secure SaaS portal for 200+ clients featuring role-based authentication and automated AWS deployment workflows.

projects.title: Digital Billing System
projects.description: Created interactive invoice management with structured JSON data and third-party plugin integration (Gmail / AWS S3).
